text.title: langchain-memory Output Contract
text.summary: Decision-record schema for selecting and wiring a LangChain memory backend. Every emitted record must validate against the JSON schema below; both a valid and invalid example are included.

example-violations.violation: ttl_seconds=0 — rule r14 requires positive TTL.
store_backend=in-memory but expected_turns=60 — in-memory dies on restart.
memory_type=buffer with semantic recall_pattern — rule r5 demands vector.
rejected array empty — output-contract requires ≥1 alternative analysed.
audit.rule_refs empty — every decision must cite at least one rule.

list.item: JSON validates against the schema above.
memory_type matches the decision tree leaf for the given drivers.
store_backend is durable (not in-memory) for any production target.
session_id_strategy is uuid or hashed (never raw user email/id).
rejected[] contains ≥1 entry with a real reason.
